description: Letter from Mevorakh b. Yisrael Januni in Palermo to Nahray b. Nissim in Fustat. July 31, 1052. The writer tries to take care of shipments of goods that belong to Nahray, and therefore traveled to Sfax and then to Palermo. He informs Nahray about the tasks that he could not do. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #755) VMRj
description_he: מכתב מהמאה ה-11 מפלרמו לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
